name: brain-library
description: Read-only library index diagnostics for the rtime brain knowledge library.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect brain library, Obsidian, Zotero, and DocPack readiness.
interface.longDescription: Brain Library provides read-only diagnostics for the rtime brain library, including Obsidian vault signals, Zotero/Better BibTeX clues, DocPack citation status, and local index readiness.
